# Wrangler Secret Commands

<!-- DO NOT EDIT: generated by tools/config-registry/generate.mjs -->

Run with the intended Worker environment selected. Values are read interactively by Wrangler.

- `wrangler secret put ADMIN_ALLOWED_EMAILS`
- `wrangler secret put ADMIN_BEARER_TOKEN`
- `wrangler secret put ADMIN_EMAIL`
- `wrangler secret put ADMIN_PASSWORD`
- `wrangler secret put ADMIN_SETUP_TOKEN`
- `wrangler secret put ADMIN_USERNAME`
- `wrangler secret put AI_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put AI_EMBEDDING_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put AI_IMAGE_PROXY_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put AI_SERVE_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put BACKEND_GATEWAY_SIGNING_SECRET`
- `wrangler secret put BACKEND_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put BACKEND_ORIGIN`
- `wrangler secret put BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put GATEWAY_SIGNING_SECRET`
- `wrangler secret put GEMINI_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put GITHUB_CLIENT_ID`
- `wrangler secret put GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET`
- `wrangler secret put GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID`
- `wrangler secret put GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET`
- `wrangler secret put INTERNAL_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put JWT_SECRET`
- `wrangler secret put OAUTH_REDIRECT_BASE_URL`
- `wrangler secret put OPENAI_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put OPENCODE_AUTH_TOKEN`
- `wrangler secret put PERPLEXITY_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put RESEND_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put SECRETS_ENCRYPTION_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put SERPER_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put TAVILY_API_KEY`
- `wrangler secret put TERMINAL_SESSION_SECRET`
- `wrangler secret put TOTP_SECRET`
